title: Delhi High Court protects personality rights of Arjun Kapoor
description: The Delhi High Court has restrained various social media handles and websites from exploiting Bollywood actor Arjun Kapoor’s personality rights, including selling merchandise featuring his name or image.Justice Tushar Rao Gedela on April 29 passed an ex parte interim injunction to protect Kapoor's personality rights.The Court directed Google and Meta to take down infringing URL links and also provide Basic Subscriber Information (BSI) of the persons operating social media accounts to circulate t
